effects.name: Barbarian's Dash
effects.description: Using a Mobility or Movement skill increases Movement Speed by 41% for 3s.

precision.limitation: Exact only for a confirmed successful qualifying activation at occurredAgoMs 0. Elapsed duration and positive Buff Duration are not modeled; aged events, cooldown-bearing triggers, activation locks, and uptime estimates fail closed.

effects.name: Suppressing Strike
effects.description: When applying a Stun, Shock, Bind, or Collision effect on a target with a Greatsword, increases Heavy Attack damage by 28% for 5s.

effects.name: Victor's Morale
effects.description: Dealing damage with a skill restores 12 Health and 30 Mana. Does not apply to Damage over time effects.

effects.name: Raging Frenzy
effects.description: If there are 3 or more enemies within a 5m radius, Skill Damage Boost +135. When applying Shock to a target with a Greatsword, gains the same effect for 3s.

effects.name: Cold Warrior
effects.description: Melee, Range, and Magic Hit Chance on Stunned or Shocked targets are increased by 318. Melee, Range, and Magic Critical Hits are increased by 120. When a Greatsword attack from the back lands on the target, has a 7% chance to apply Shock to the target for 2s.

effects.name: Gerad's Patience
effects.description: Increases all CC Resistance by 20.5 for 3 upon evading an attack, shield blocking, or blocking with a Defense skill. All CC Resistance increase by 3 additionally when evading or shield blocking attacks coming from the front. Stacks up to 10 times.

effects.name: Resilient Mind
effects.description: Evading or blocking an attack using Shield Block, Shield Survival Technique restores Health by 21. Evading an attack restores Mana by 51, and blocking an attack using Shield Block, Shield Survival Technique restores 7.7% (38.5% against monsters) of blocked damage as Mana. Each Shield Survival Technique can trigger the Health and Mana restoration up to 30 times.

effects.name: Morale Boost
effects.description: Colliding with a target decreases the remaining cooldowns for Attack, Control, and Mobility skills by 14%. Each subsequent Collision on a target decreases the remaining cooldowns for Attack, Control, and Mobility skills by 8%, up to 3 times.

effects.name: Gerad's Shield
effects.description: Provides all party members within 15m with a buff for 3s when you defend against a Fury Attack or Wrath Attack with a Defense Skill. Each effect has a 6s cooldown. Melee Attack - All Heavy Attack Chance +130 Ranged Attack - Collision Chance +130 Magic Attack - All Defense +4.25% Buff is not affected by the Buff Duration stat.

effects.name: Spectrum of Agony
effects.description: Attacking the target that has Provoking Roar or Cleaving Roar that you applied will extend the duration of the Provoking Roar or Cleaving Roar by 0.4s. The duration increase applies up to 3 times per second. Deals 77% of Base Damage + 39 damage to all targets with Provoking Roar or Cleaving Roar within a 3m radius. Does not apply additional effects.

effects.name: Skillful Evasion
effects.description: Increases Magic and Ranged Evasion by 33 per 1m of proximity to the target within a 10m radius, up to 330. Additionally increases Magic, Melee, and Ranged Evasion by up to 120 against Provoked targets.

effects.name: Vampiric Contract
effects.description: Selected ally's health is restored 18.9% of the damage dealt by the user, from a target affected by the user's Curse. If the attack lands on the target's side or back, the recovery increases by 10%. Restores ally's health in close proximity, otherwise it restores the user's Health instead if no allies are within range.

effects.name: Wraith's Beckon
effects.description: Increases the user's Curse duration by 3.55s as well as the Curse Chance by 4%.

effects.name: Full of Corruption
effects.description: When a target Weakened by the user dies within 10s, Mana Regen increases by 28 and Max Damage increases by 45 for 9s. Can be stacked up to 3 times.

effects.name: Devotion and Emptiness
effects.description: Healing increases by 38.5% and Healing Skill cooldown decreases by 10% during the day. Skill Damage over time increases by 38.5% and Curse Skill cooldown decreases by 10% at night.

effects.name: Saint's Oath
effects.description: Taking Skill Damage has a(n) 20% chance to increase Healing, Amitoi Healing, and Potion Healing by 16%. Stacks up to 5 times.

effects.name: Curse Resonance
effects.description: Party members other than yourself within Attack Range have a(n) 2.35% chance to cast Dark Explosion for 30% damage after a 1s delay upon hitting enemies affected by your Curse Damage over time. This does not remove the Curse. Boosts damage by 5% per stack of Touch of Despair that you applied.

effects.name: Selfless Soul
effects.description: Granting Health Recovery and Regen to allies via Active Skills increases Mana Regen by 41 and Healing by 9.7% per stack for 3s. Stacks up to 5 times.
